## Safety and privacy

Could this add automatic AI calls, automatic writes/deletes, note-type mutation, background networking, file scanning, credential storage, or new collection access? Explain how review, duplicate checking, and final confirmation remain intact.

## Alternatives

What simpler workflow or documentation change could solve the same problem?
